title: More Lighting Variants
description: A mod to add more copper & soul variants of decorative light blocks!
body:
## More Lighting Variants
**<ins>Current Features:</ins>**
- Adds Copper Jack o'Lantern Variant
- Adds Soul Jack o'Lantern Variant
- Adds Copper Campfire Variant
- Adds Copper Candles


![All Current Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7860c2a473c0f76425b08d3df25464d380427971.png)

**<ins>Copper Candle Features:</ins>**

Copper Candles mimic the functionality of both vanilla candles and vanilla oxidizing copper blocks. They're able to;
- Be placed in groups of up to four within a single block
- Be placed upon a cake
- Ignite using a Flint and Steel or Fire Charge (w/ Green Flame!)
- Oxidize over time
- Be waxed using a honeycomb
- Be scraped by an axe to revert oxidation or waxing
- Be deoxidized by a lightning strike
  
**<ins>Plans for Future Releases:</ins>**
- Copper Fire?
- Soul Candles?
